notes: Buddy pokemon can now browse with you!
Extension popup has new buddy controls to show/hide buddy and change position.
Added catch sound to pokemon encounters.
Added audio controls to extension popup.
New badge feature! Display your achievements on your profile.
Added buddy display names on user profiles.
Overhauled type tokens. Encounters are now instant.
Fixed type icons not rendering properly.
Fixed bug with friend achivements being one-sided.
